zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight於大約1260年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾時，他的父親Sir Archibald Mure 2nd Lord Rowallan30歲，母親Lady Margaret De Montgomerie Mure of Rowallan26歲。他於1290年與Margaret Lindsey在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾可萊吉結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1346年10月17日之後在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight于大约1260年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾时，他的父亲Sir Archibald Mure 2nd Lord Rowallan30岁，母亲Lady Margaret De Montgomerie Mure of Rowallan26岁。他于1290年与Margaret Lindsey在英国苏格兰艾斯爾可萊吉结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1346年10月17日之后在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可。

nameMeanings.name: Mure
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Old French muer ‘mewer’, i.e. someone who tended to hawks in the cages in which they were kept while moulting. Compare Mew .

variants.name: Mura
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Akio, Hideo, Masao, Nanako, Tsutomu, Yoshi.  French Alphonse, Amie, Henri.
German: altered form of some similar (like-sounding) German or perhaps French surname. It is also common in France (Alsace), where it was first recorded in the form Morrau, later Murra(w).
Italian (southern Sardinia): topographic name or nickname from Sardinian mura ‘mulberry’ or ‘blackberry’.

variants.name: Muir
meanings: Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived on a moor, from Older Scots muir ‘moor’ (an expanse of bare, wild upland country). There has been some confusion with Mure .

variants.name: Morea
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Saverio, Domenic, Ferdinando, Rocco.  Spanish Manuel, Carlos, Cesar, Elvira, Jesus, Mauricio.

Italian (Apulia): from the personal name Morea, originally a habitational name from Morea, the medieval name of the Greek region of Peloponnese, named as the land of mulberry trees, from mōrea ‘mulberry’.
Spanish and Catalan: habitational name from any of the places called Morea, in Badajoz, Navarre, and Lleida provinces.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight was born about 1260, in Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Archibald Mure 2nd Lord Rowallan, was 30 and his mother, Lady Margaret De Montgomerie Mure of Rowallan, was 26. He married Margaret Lindsey in 1290, in Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died after 17 October 1346, in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight est né environ 1260, à Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Archibald Mure 2nd Lord Rowallan, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret De Montgomerie Mure of Rowallan, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Lindsey en 1290, à Craigie, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après 17 octobre 1346, à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight um 1260 in Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Archibald Mure 2nd Lord Rowallan 30 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret De Montgomerie Mure of Rowallan 26. Er hat 1290 in Craigie, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Margaret Lindsey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 17. Oktober 1346 in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight è nato il circa 1260 nel Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Archibald Mure 2nd Lord Rowallan, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret De Montgomerie Mure of Rowallan, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Lindsey nel 1290, nel Craigie, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 17 ottobre 1346, nel Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knightが約1260年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Archibald Mure 2nd Lord Rowallanは30歳，母Lady Margaret De Montgomerie Mure of Rowallanは26歳であった。1290年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアクレイジでMargaret Lindseyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1346年10月17日以後にスコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight(이)가 대략 1260년 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Archibald Mure 2nd Lord Rowallan(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret De Montgomerie Mure of Rowallan(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1290년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 크레이기에서 Margaret Lindsey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1346년 10월 17일 이후 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬마노크에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight nasceu aproximadamente 1260, em Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Archibald Mure 2nd Lord Rowallan, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret De Montgomerie Mure of Rowallan, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Lindsey em 1290, em Craigie, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu após 17 de outubro de 1346, em Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight родился около 1260 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Archibald Mure 2nd Lord Rowallan было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret De Montgomerie Mure of Rowallan, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Lindsey в 1290 г. в местности креиги, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер после 17 октябрь 1346 г. в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight nació aproximadamente 1260, en Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Archibald Mure 2nd Lord Rowallan, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret De Montgomerie Mure of Rowallan, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Margaret Lindsey en 1290, en Craigie, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 17 de octubre de 1346, en Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland.
